sections_cited: Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-8114 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 34242/2022 2. For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this matter pertains to Section 4C of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 and the controversy has been decided by a Division Bench of this Court in the case of Shell Petroleum Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & others reported as 2023 PTD 607, therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
